name: Omar Mwinyi Shimbwa
bio: Hon. Omar Mwinyi Shimbwa is the Member of the National Assembly for Changamwe Constituency, Mombasa County, sitting in the 13th Parliament of Kenya for the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM). He was first elected to the seat in 2013 and re-elected in 2017.

name: Bady Bady Twalib
bio: Hon. Bady Bady Twalib is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Jomvu constituency, Mombasa County, elected on the ODM ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). He won the 2022 general election with 13,850 votes, defeating Renson Thoya of Jubilee. First elected in 2013, he is now serving his third consecutive term.

name: Samuel Gonzi Rai
bio: Hon. Samuel Gonzi Rai is the current Member of the National Assembly for Kinango Constituency, Kwale County, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027) on the Pamoja African Alliance (PAA) ticket, to which he was re-elected in the August 2022 general election after losing the seat in 2017. First elected to Parliament in 1992 on a KANU ticket following the death of Ali Bidu, he was subsequently re-elected in 2002 and 2007 on the Ford-People ticket.

name: Ali Wario
bio: Hon. Guyo Ali Wario is a Member of the National Assembly in Kenya's 13th Parliament (2022–2027), representing Garsen Constituency in Tana River County. He was elected on the ODM (Azimio) ticket.

name: Ibrahim Abdi Saney
bio: Hon. Ibrahim Abdi Saney is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Wajir North Constituency, Wajir County, elected on a UDA ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). His 2022 election was challenged by petition, but the petition was dismissed, upholding his win with 6,502 votes.

name: Abass Sheikh Mohamed
bio: Sen. Abass Sheikh Mohamed is the Senator for Wajir County in the 13th Parliament of Kenya, elected in 2022 on the United Democratic Movement (UDM) ticket for a term running from 16 August 2022 to 29 July 2027. He previously served as a Member of the 11th Parliament for a Wajir seat from 2013 to 2017.

name: Lekuton Joseph
bio: Hon. Joseph Lemasolai Lekuton is the current sitting Member of the National Assembly for Laisamis Constituency, Marsabit County, in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). Elected in the August 2022 general election on a United Democratic Movement (UDM) ticket within the Kenya Kwanza coalition — returning to the seat with 6,157 votes after about a decade out of Parliament — he serves as Vice-Chair of the Committee on Powers and Privileges.

name: Joseph Samal Lomwa
bio: Hon. Joseph Samal Lomwa is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Isiolo North Constituency, representing the Jubilee Party (JP) in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022-2027). He won the seat in the 2022 general election with 10,326 votes, defeating Hassan Odha and Mwenda Thuranira. Lomwa previously served as the Member of Parliament for Isiolo North in the 11th Parliament (2013-2017).

name: Abdul Rahim Dawood
bio: Hon. Abdul Rahim Dawood is a member of the National Assembly of Kenya representing North Imenti Constituency, Meru County, serving as an Independent in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027). He is a Kenyan businessman.

name: Rachael Kaki Nyamai
bio: Hon. Rachael Kaki Nyamai is the Member of the National Assembly for Kitui South Constituency, Kitui County, elected on the Jubilee Party (JP) ticket. She is serving a term running from 16 August 2022 to 2027.

name: Nganga Alice Wambui
bio: Hon. Nganga Alice Wambui is a Kenyan politician and the Member of Parliament for Thika Town Constituency, Kiambu County, elected in 2022 on a UDA ticket. She is a sitting member of the 13th Parliament (National Assembly) and serves as Chairperson of the Departmental Committee on Social Protection.

name: Anthony Kimani Ichung'wah
bio: Hon. Anthony Kimani Ichung'wah is the Member of Parliament for Kikuyu Constituency in Kiambu County, serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya after being elected on a United Democratic Alliance (UDA) ticket. He is the Leader of the Majority Party in the National Assembly.

name: Robert Pukose
bio: Hon. Robert Pukose is the current Member of the National Assembly for Endebess Constituency, Trans Nzoia County, elected on a UDA ticket in the 13th Parliament. A medical doctor and consultant general surgeon by profession, he serves as Vice Chairperson of the Budget and Appropriations Committee and Vice Chair of the Health Committee (2025-2026).

name: Samuel Arama
bio: Hon. Samuel Arama is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Nakuru Town West constituency, Nakuru County, elected on a Jubilee Party (JP) ticket. First elected in 2013, he is serving his third term, having also been returned in the 2017 and 2022 general elections.

name: David Gikaria
bio: Hon. David Gikaria is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Nakuru Town East constituency in Nakuru County, representing the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) in the 13th Parliament (2022–2027). He was elected to a third term in the 2022 general election, having first been elected in 2013 on a TNA ticket and re-elected in 2017.

name: David Ouma Ochieng'
bio: Hon. David Ouma Ochieng' is the current Member of the National Assembly for Ugenya Constituency in Siaya County and the leader of the Movement for Democracy and Growth (MDG) party. He is a Kenyan politician serving in the 13th Parliament of Kenya (2022–2027).

name: Joshua Aduma Owuor
bio: Hon. Joshua Aduma Owuor is the Member of the National Assembly for Nyakach Constituency in Kisumu County, representing the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) in the 13th Parliament. A lawyer by profession, he is serving his third term, having first been elected in 2013 and re-elected in 2017 and 2022. He sits on the National Government Constituencies Development Fund (NG-CDF) committee.

name: Timothy Wanyonyi Wetangula
bio: Hon. Timothy Wanyonyi Wetangula is the current Member of the National Assembly for Westlands Constituency, Nairobi County, serving on an Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) ticket in the 13th Parliament (2022–present). A Kenyan lawyer and politician, he won the Westlands seat in the 2022 general election, defeating Nelson Havi.

name: James Mwangi Gakuya
bio: Hon. James Mwangi Gakuya is the sitting Member of the National Assembly for Embakasi North Constituency, Nairobi County, serving in the 13th Parliament after being elected on a UDA ticket in the 2022 general election. He first won the seat in the 2013 general election on a TNA (Jubilee coalition) ticket.

name: Yusuf Hassan Abdi
bio: Hon. Yusuf Hassan Abdi is the current Member of the National Assembly for Kamukunji Constituency, Nairobi County, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027) on a Jubilee Party (JP) ticket. He won the Kamukunji seat in the 2022 Kenyan general election, having first entered parliament in 2011 through the Kamukunji by-election.

name: Mboko Mishi Juma Khamisi
bio: Hon. Mboko Mishi Juma Khamisi is the Member of the National Assembly for Likoni Constituency, Mombasa County, elected on the ODM ticket and serving in the 13th Parliament. First elected to the Likoni seat in 2017, defeating incumbent Masoud Mwahima, Mboko was re-elected in 2022.

name: Adagala Beatrice Kahai
bio: Hon. Adagala Beatrice Kahai is the County Woman Representative for Vihiga in the National Assembly, serving in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027) as a member of the Amani National Congress (ANC). She was first elected in 2017 and re-elected in 2022, winning the Vihiga Woman Representative seat with 52,507 votes.

name: Wanjiku Muhia
bio: Hon. Wanjiku Muhia is the Member of the National Assembly for Kipipiri Constituency, Nyandarua County, in the 13th Parliament (2022-2027), where she serves as a member of the Regional Integration Committee. She won the seat in the 2022 general election on a UDA ticket, defeating incumbent Amos Kimunya. She previously served in the East African Legislative Assembly (4th EALA, 2018-2022).

name: Sarah Paulata Korere
bio: Hon. Sarah Paulata Korere is the current Member of the National Assembly for Laikipia North constituency in Laikipia County, elected on a Jubilee Party (JP) ticket. She won the seat in the 2022 general election with 14,148 votes and serves in the 13th Parliament of Kenya, with a term running from 2022 to 2027.
